name: Santas Christmas Escape VR
short_description: Help Santa be on time for Christmas as you discover the magic of Santa's Workshop and the Northpole, Solve puzzles, See Elves and look at toys, yes it even has Santa, Now you too can experience the fun of being an elf. explore a fun colorful environment.
detailed_description:
Help Santa be on time for Christmas as you discover the magic of Santa's Workshop and the Northpole,

Solve puzzles, See Elves and look at toys, yes it even has Santa,

Now you too can experience the fun of being an elf.

Explore a fun colorful environment.

Finally find out what Santa's workshop really looks like.

This game features

---------------------

Animation

Santa, Elves, Gingerbread Men, and more

Puzzles

Interact with almost everything

2 types of movement

Big Map
